skill.name: seo-optimizer
skill.description: SEO guidance skill for content strategy, technical optimization, keyword planning, metadata, structured data, and Core Web Vitals review.
skill.summary: Improve search visibility with practical SEO content, technical, and strategy guidance.
skill.author: davila7

security_audit.summary: The static findings are false positives caused by Markdown code fences, HTML examples, SEO terms, and example URLs. The skill is prompt-only guidance with no executable scripts, no live network calls, no filesystem access, and no prompt injection text found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Code Fences Reported as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported Ruby or shell backtick execution, but the referenced lines are Markdown code fences and SEO examples. No executable command invocation was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The matched syntax is Markdown fencing around examples. There is no shell interpreter, Ruby code, command substitution, or user-controlled execution path.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Example URLs Reported as Network Activity
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URLs are schema.org, sitemap, canonical tag, and example.com documentation examples. They do not perform HTTP requests or transmit user data.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URLs appear only in static SEO markup examples. No fetch, curl, wget, webhook, or outbound request code is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern Matches
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported weak cryptographic algorithms in SKILL.md and audit_result.json, but review found no cryptographic implementation or hashing logic in the skill content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed files contain SEO prose and report metadata, not cryptographic code. No MD5, SHA-1, cipher API, password hashing, or security-sensitive digest use was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance Pattern Matches
low_findings.description: Static analysis reported system reconnaissance, but the referenced lines are ordinary SEO guidance about mistakes, layout stability, and anchor text.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The matched lines contain no host identifiers, process listing, network interface checks, or OS commands. They are static content recommendations.

content.value_statement: Weak search visibility reduces organic traffic and makes useful content harder to find. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through SEO reviews, content planning, metadata, schema markup, and technical checks.
actual_capabilities: Reviews page titles, meta descriptions, headings, URL structure, and internal links.
Guides keyword selection by search intent, topic clusters, and content opportunity.
Suggests structured data patterns for articles, products, local businesses, FAQs, and breadcrumbs.
Provides Core Web Vitals guidance for LCP, FID, CLS, mobile usability, and page speed.
Creates SEO content checklists for blog posts, product pages, category pages, and landing pages.
Explains monitoring metrics for organic traffic, rankings, click-through rate, and conversions.
limitations: Does not fetch live keyword volume, ranking, backlink, or competitor data by itself.
Does not modify a live website unless the user separately provides access and instructions.
Cannot guarantee search ranking changes because algorithms, competition, and site authority vary.
Provides guidance based on supplied page content, URLs, metrics, and user context.

use_cases.title: Improve a blog post before publishing
use_cases.description: Review the title, meta description, heading structure, keyword placement, internal links, and content depth.

use_cases.title: Plan technical SEO fixes
use_cases.description: Identify improvements for schema markup, canonical tags, sitemap entries, mobile layout, and Core Web Vitals.

use_cases.title: Build a local SEO page plan
use_cases.description: Create location-focused page structure, LocalBusiness schema guidance, service keywords, and review optimization ideas.

prompt_templates.title: Review one page
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this page for SEO. Check the title, meta description, H1, headings, keyword use, image alt text, and internal links. Give prioritized fixes.

prompt_templates.title: Plan keyword targets
prompt_templates.prompt: Create keyword targets for a page about [topic]. Group terms by search intent, choose a primary keyword, and suggest supporting phrases.

prompt_templates.title: Audit technical SEO
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this page or template for technical SEO. Review schema markup, canonical tags, sitemap needs, mobile behavior, Core Web Vitals, and indexing risks.

prompt_templates.title: Design topic clusters
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a topic cluster strategy for [main topic]. Define the pillar page, supporting articles, keyword mapping, internal links, and success metrics.

output_examples.input: Review a product category page for running shoes.
output: Priority fixes: shorten the title, add a benefit-led meta description, and make the H1 match the category intent.
Content additions: include buyer guidance, fit information, comparison sections, FAQs, and internal links to related shoe types.
Technical checks: verify Product or ItemList schema, canonical tags, image dimensions, lazy loading, and mobile layout stability.

output_examples.input: Create a content plan for a React Hooks guide.
output: Primary page: a complete React Hooks guide targeting broad informational intent.
Supporting pages: useState tutorial, useEffect examples, custom hooks, performance patterns, and testing hooks.
Internal links: link each tutorial back to the main guide and cross-link related hook examples.

output_examples.input: Improve a local service page for a dental clinic.
output: Page structure: service overview, location details, trust signals, appointment call to action, and patient FAQs.
Local SEO: add LocalBusiness guidance, consistent name and address details, review prompts, and nearby service area references.
Measurement: track organic visits, calls, form submissions, map actions, and ranking changes for local queries.

best_practices: Provide the current page content, target audience, business goal, and known performance metrics.
Ask for prioritized recommendations so urgent technical issues come before optional content improvements.
Validate recommendations with live SEO tools when keyword volume, ranking, or backlink data is required.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for guaranteed rankings or fixed traffic growth from SEO changes.
Do not force keywords into copy when it reduces clarity or user value.
Do not treat example schema or metadata as final production code without site-specific review.

faq.question: Does this skill perform live SEO scans?
faq.answer: No. It provides SEO analysis and guidance from the information you provide.

faq.question: Can it help with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The prompts and guidance are compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code workflows.

faq.question: What SEO areas does it cover?
faq.answer: It covers keyword strategy, on-page SEO, metadata, structured data, Core Web Vitals, internal links, and content planning.

faq.question: Can it replace Ahrefs, SEMrush, or Search Console?
faq.answer: No. Those tools provide live data. This skill helps interpret data and turn it into action plans.

faq.question: Is it useful for local business websites?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes local SEO guidance, LocalBusiness schema concepts, service page planning, and review optimization.

faq.question: Does it store or transmit website data?
faq.answer: No evidence found of storage or transmission code. The skill is Markdown guidance only.
